name: Team Katie
subject: Sign your name (climate change)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend -- Did you see Katie's email below? She's taking on Pat Toomey and his Republican buddies on climate change -- and she needs your help. **[Will you stand with Katie and demand Republicans stop denying climate science?](https://act.myngp.com/el/609781572442259456/6361076088428298240?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)**

Earth Day is coming up this week. We could really use your help before then.

Thanks,

Team Katie

_\---- Original Message ----
From: Katie McGinty
Subject: Tell Toomey: (climate change)_

Friend --

You may know that I have a history of fighting for environmental causes. I worked with Vice President Al Gore to strengthen the Clean Air Act, led President Clinton's White House Council on Environmental Quality, and headed the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection under Governor Ed Rendell.

I've dedicated my career to protecting our environment and making sure our kids can live in the world they inherit. So when Republicans like Pat Toomey not only refuse to take action on climate change, _but also refuse to even acknowledge that the science behind it is real -- that 's not something I can accept._

**[Will you add your name to demand Republicans in Congress stop denying climate science and take action?](https://act.myngp.com/el/609781572442259456/6361076088428298240?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/609781572442259456/6361076088428298240?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)
---

It's long past time for our country to take meaningful steps to address the very real threat of climate change. And to do that, we need ALL of our leaders in Washington to accept the scientific data and acknowledge climate change is real.

When we do that, we can harness our renewable energy resources to create good jobs and cut electricity bills for taxpayers. We will support innovations in clean energy technologies and level the playing field for companies that adopt them -- policies I championed in Pennsylvania and plan to lead on in the U.S. Senate.

**None of this will happen as long as Republicans like Pat Toomey -- who has an appalling 0% rating from the League of Conservation Voters -- continue denying reality.**

**[Tell Toomey and his friends in Congress: Stop denying climate science.](https://act.myngp.com/el/609781572442259456/6361076088428298240?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate)**

Thanks for your help,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/609781572442259456/6505191276504154112?refcode=e20160418&refcode2=e20160418&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/609781572442259456/6289018494390370304).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

body:
We need to win big on Tuesday | Friend --

The New York primary is in just one day, and Bernie’s team has outspent us by more than TWO MILLION DOLLARS on TV ads. **[If we want to bring home a big win, we need to close that gap in these crucial final 24 hours.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUyNjI0NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjcwNjYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Bernie’s campaign manager says they’re “100 percent, absolutely” going to push for a contested convention -- and Bernie didn’t dispute that during Thursday’s debate -- so it’s more important than ever that we build our pledged delegate lead as much as possible. New York and California are the two biggest states left to vote, so what happens on Tuesday could well determine how large our lead is heading into the convention in July.

name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: A sacrifice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Please read this! This could be the most important email I have ever written. I hope you will stop now and take a moment to read it. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867153:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)
---
Dear Friend,

Please read this!

This could be the most important email I have ever written. I hope you will stop now and take a moment to read it.

Here's the situation: in the next 24 hours, voters will go to the polls once again -- so, I'm making my best case to prove to you and the American people that I am best prepared to lead America for the next four years.

But before voters cast their votes tomorrow I need to ask you an important question: **[Will you make a key sacrifice in the next 24 hours?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867153:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)**

I wouldn't ask you this if I hadn't already done it myself.

Please let me explain...

You see, running for President of the United States is a significant sacrifice. Only by the grace of God -- and with unwavering help from my wonderful supporters like you -- have we reached this point -- on the verge of capturing the Republican nomination.

And while I'm on the verge of victory, I need to share something with you.

The sacrifices for our campaign are steep, but I'm proud to be making them on your behalf:

| >>> | **The constant attacks never stop:** The liberal media, Hillary Clinton, and Donald Trump know the best way to defeat me and score another win for the Washington Cartel is to tear me down. I face a constant barrage of political and personal attacks daily.

---|---
>>> | **Time with my family is non-existent:** Spending almost every day on the campaign trail means precious little time spent with my wife, Heidi, and my daughters -- the very family that gives me the motivation and drive to fight.

>>> | **Health and sleep are limited:** Fighting morning and night for the future of our country ensures long nights and early mornings resulting in little to no sleep.

>>> | **Personal time is not possible:** You think of this the least, but as a candidate, my days are no longer my own. Days start before dawn and many times don't end until early the next morning. There is almost no personal time when you run for president.

Friend, let me be clear. I'm willingly making these sacrifices -- despite the high cost...

I'm choosing to make them because I believe we live in a time where we will lose the very freedom and liberty we all cherish as Americans if good people don't make the selfless sacrifices necessary to secure both.

This campaign is a sacrifice not only for me, but also for my wife and daughters.

I think you will agree with me that, though steep, these sacrifices are well worth it.

So, today I'm asking you to make an important sacrifice with me, Friend.

**[Will you join me by making a special, sacrificial gift to my campaign in the next 24 hours -- before voters go to the polls again?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867153:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)**

I've asked my team to put together these secure links below so you can make an instant and secure sacrificial gift -- it can be done in just five minutes or less:

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $35 TO RESTORE AMERICA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867154:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)**

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $100 TO RESTORE AMERICA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867155:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)**

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $250 TO RESTORE AMERICA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867156:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)**

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $1000 TO RESTORE AMERICA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867157:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)**

In less than 24 hours, voters will go to the polls again. I'm asking courageous conservatives like you stand up and fight with me. [**Will you make a special gift -- before the next votes are cast -- to help restore America?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867153:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r)

I wouldn't ask you if 1) I wasn't willing to make the same sacrifice myself; and 2) the stakes weren't so high.

Friend, time is critical, and if you will, please make this special gift in the next 24 hours -- Heidi and I would be so grateful.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. Friend, I've chosen to make the critical sacrifices in our fight to restore America. **[Will you join me with your gift of $250 or $100?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34867153:syUf5SCjN:m:1:1320601823:406D604D5E166C05C80B0CDCB2691C1E:r) OR $35 or $10 if that is a stretch gift for you, Heidi and I will be grateful for every dollar you can sacrifice and will ensure it is faithfully used.**

| PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

name: Joe Sestak
subject: We're in a fight for our (Democratic) soul
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199b3/3476a20e/d9db7df/27421754/2630916582/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, When I announced our Senate campaign, I said "We are in a fight for the soul of America." But I believe we are also in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party. I do not take being opposed by my party's D.C. leadership lightly, and last year requested several meetings with key U.S. Senators. DC was uneasy I had refused to sit down in the 2009/2010 Senate race after Senator Specter switched parties, even though they had initially asked me to run against Specter while he was still a Republican. A senior Senator made it clear what was at stake for them: "Sestak, whenever I tell you anything, the only answer is to be 'yes.'" | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199b3/3476a20e/d9db7df/27421753/2630916582/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0418FB2b1&amounts=25,40,60,125,200,500,2700")
---
It may be unnerving to some that almost the entire DC and PA Democratic establishment seem opposed to me, but I understand the political challenge most are under, as one Senator called last week to say, "Joe, I want you to know a lot of us are pulling for you down here."
So what is _really at stake_ is something different for the Democratic Party than "just say yes" - and it is what is also ailing America. The _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ and _The Philadelphia Inquirer_ underscored it in their endorsement of me for my "independence... accountability... integrity," "willingness to put principle above party," but with "deep understanding of government and foreign policy."
Similarly, Admiral Vern Clark, the last Chief of Naval Operations I worked for in the U.S. Navy, told _The Philadelphia Inquirer_ about me: "Incredible moral courage, the courage to take the independent stand. When everybody else was saying, 'This is what we ought to do,' he would stand up and say, 'I don't see it that way.'" "He was an incredible officer, the best I've ever seen."
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199b3/3476a20e/d9db7df/27421752/2630916582/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0418FB2b2&amounts=25,40,60,125,200,500,2700")
---
Which brings us to our "soul" ... and DC's lack of accountability for it.
On the one hand, it may seem small. My 2010 refusal to give half a million dollars in "street money" still remains upsetting to certain PA Democratic politicians. But I had seen as I flew into Afghanistan with someone who had millions in cash to buy "loyalty" from the tribes, that even this more serious "street money" doesn't buy loyalty or accountability; nor would there have been any for those who contributed to me here at home.
Bigger yet, millions of dollars have been given to the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and other outside interest groups for it to be used to defeat Republicans. Now, because of the personal direction/whim of one Senator, with no discussion or concurrence of the Democratic donors, $4 million of it is being used at his sole, unaccountable discretion against me, a fellow Democrat - and not Pat Toomey or Donald Trump.
_I am now out-funded**by more money from my party** than the first year of _Citizens United_ when I ran against Pat Toomey_ and came within 2 percent - yet, I am still leading in today's polls.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199b3/3476a20e/d9db7df/27421751/2630916582/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0418FB2b3&amounts=25,40,60,125,200,500,2700")
---
But the real issue is that our DC party leaders, in having become power brokers instead of leaders, have permitted the corruption of our purpose, our mission.
DC Democratic money is now used without asking donors whether it can be contrary to the original purpose of the contribution: not against Republicans, but against another Democrat...and in support of the DC-chosen candidate (their 7th choice to run against me) who got 8% of the vote in the race for governor.
Trust is the biggest deficit in America today; sadly, we have permitted it to erode our Democratic soul. [Help me begin to restore that trust by supporting my willingness to put "principle" first...and win. Please contribute $25, $40, $60, $125, $200, or whatever you will - to have a warrior for integrity in service for you.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199b3/3476a20e/d9db7df/27421750/2630916582/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0418FB2p1&amounts=25,40,60,125,200,500,2700")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199b3/3476a20e/d9db7df/27421753/2630916582/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0418FB2b1&amounts=25,40,60,125,200,500,2700")
---
Warmly,

clean_body: "" Peter, When I announced our Senate campaign, I said "We are in a fight for the soul of America." But I believe we are also in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party. I do not take being opposed by my party's D.C. leadership lightly, and last year requested several meetings with key U.S. Senators. DC was uneasy I had refused to sit down in the 2009/2010 Senate race after Senator Specter switched parties, even though they had initially asked me to run against Specter while he was still a Republican. A senior Senator made it clear what was at stake for them: "Sestak, whenever I tell you anything, the only answer is to be 'yes.'" | "" It may be unnerving to some that almost the entire DC and PA Democratic establishment seem opposed to me, but I understand the political challenge most are under, as one Senator called last week to say, "Joe, I want you to know a lot of us are pulling for you down here." So what is really at stake is something different for the Democratic Party than "just say yes" - and it is what is also ailing America. The Pittsburgh Post-Gazette and The Philadelphia Inquirer underscored it in their endorsement of me for my "independence... accountability... integrity," "willingness to put principle above party," but with "deep understanding of government and foreign policy." Similarly, Admiral Vern Clark, the last Chief of Naval Operations I worked for in the U.S. Navy, told The Philadelphia Inquirer about me: "Incredible moral courage, the courage to take the independent stand. When everybody else was saying, 'This is what we ought to do,' he would stand up and say, 'I don't see it that way.'" "He was an incredible officer, the best I've ever seen." "" Which brings us to our "soul" ... and DC's lack of accountability for it. On the one hand, it may seem small. My 2010 refusal to give half a million dollars in "street money" still remains upsetting to certain PA Democratic politicians. But I had seen as I flew into Afghanistan with someone who had millions in cash to buy "loyalty" from the tribes, that even this more serious "street money" doesn't buy loyalty or accountability; nor would there have been any for those who contributed to me here at home. Bigger yet, millions of dollars have been given to the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and other outside interest groups for it to be used to defeat Republicans. Now, because of the personal direction/whim of one Senator, with no discussion or concurrence of the Democratic donors, $4 million of it is being used at his sole, unaccountable discretion against me, a fellow Democrat - and not Pat Toomey or Donald Trump. I am now out-fundedby more money from my party than the first year of Citizens United when I ran against Pat Toomey and came within 2 percent - yet, I am still leading in today's polls. "" But the real issue is that our DC party leaders, in having become power brokers instead of leaders, have permitted the corruption of our purpose, our mission. DC Democratic money is now used without asking donors whether it can be contrary to the original purpose of the contribution: not against Republicans, but against another Democrat...and in support of the DC-chosen candidate (their 7th choice to run against me) who got 8% of the vote in the race for governor. Trust is the biggest deficit in America today; sadly, we have permitted it to erode our Democratic soul. "" "" Warmly, Joe | "" "" "" | ---|---|--- | Friends of Joe Sestak P.O. Box 1936 Media, PA 19063 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | "" |

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Let's make it easier to file your taxes
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Filing your taxes doesn't have to be such a pain. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4249/1c469400/5c3cbf2/351fc3e/2523260209/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fast-file?utm_source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&utm_campaign=fast-file&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Today's Tax Day, a day when many Americans will have the most direct contact with the federal government all year. And it can be a pain, scrambling to assemble all the needed documents to file your return. But it doesn't have to be this way. The government can -- and should -- make it easier to file your taxes. **That's why I'm proposing Fast File, a program that would give us access to the basic tax information that the government already has.** [**It's time to make filing your taxes less of a pain. Add your name if you agree.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4249/1c469400/5c3cbf2/351fc3e/2523260209/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fast-file?utm_source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&utm_campaign=fast-file&utm_medium=ema") Our current tax system makes it needlessly hard to file your taxes: The government requires that you find and keep all your own financial records, which is both time-consuming and frustrating. _Especially since the IRS already has most of the information you need to file your return._ Here's why: If you're an employee, your bosses send you a W-2 form at the beginning of the year. But they also send a copy of that same form to the government. Something similar happens with forms for student loans, brokerage sales, dividends, and charitable contributions. The result is that the IRS already has most of the data you send it in your tax return. Rather than collecting, saving, and worrying about all those forms, under Fast File you could download all this information -- again, information the IRS already has -- from a website. You could then use this information to fill out your tax return. [**It's as simple as that: A few clicks, and your taxes are filed. Add your name in support of Fast File.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4249/1c469400/5c3cbf2/351fc3e/2523260209/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fast-file?utm_source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&utm_campaign=fast-file&utm_medium=ema") We've already seen that there's opposition to programs like Fast File from tax-prep corporations that want to keep charging us big money to file our taxes. These companies don't want filing taxes to get easier -- that's why they've spent over $11.5 million lobbying, among other things, against proposals similar to Fast File. But the dominance of giant corporations is one big reason why Washington is broken. Together, we can stand up and demand change to make sure that Washington starts working for middle-class and working families. Tax Day should be easier, and huge corporations shouldn't be calling all the shots. Thanks for standing with me. Russ Feingold | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4249/1c469400/5c3cbf2/351fc3e/2523260209/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fast-file?utm_source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&source=ema_2016-04-18_fast-file&utm_campaign=fast-file&utm_medium=ema")

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: This should anger EVERYONE
body:
#
There's something I need to share with you, and it's probably going to anger you. It should probably anger everyone. Here it is:
**Our opponent is bending campaign finance rules to their breaking point all so Wall Street fat cats and people like Walmart's Alice Walton can get away with giving hundreds of thousands of dollars in a single contribution to benefit the Clinton campaign.**
You already know about the fundraiser Hillary Clinton held where a couple could contribute $353,000 to sit at a table with George Clooney. That money doesn't go directly to the Clinton campaign, it goes to something called the "Hillary Victory Fund" - another account that has raised almost $35 million.
Well, for MONTHS the Clinton campaign has been saying the primary purpose of that fund is to support the DNC and state parties. But that's not even close to true.
**According to the Hillary Victory Fund 's most recent FEC report, the vast majority of the money they spent in 2016 - $25 MILLION - went directly towards helping the Clinton campaign itself.**
So, what can we do about it? We can either sit back and shrug our shoulders at yet another obscene injustice. Or, we can fight. I say we fight.
[**Contribute $2.70 to Bernie 's campaign today to help us win New York and as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the way Hillary Clinton's campaign is funding its campaign and super PACs.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-keep-fighting?refcode=em160418-s2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-keep-fighting?refcode=em160418-s2-full")
So, this is distressing, but it's probably to be expected. The Clinton campaign has raised the majority of its money from people giving the maximum amount of money under the law and her super PACs have raised more than $15 million from Wall Street and the financial industry alone.
Do you believe we can change a corrupt system by taking its money? Bernie Sanders says no, and that's the choice New Yorkers face on Tuesday.
**The choice you face right now, is are you willing to contribute $2.70 to fight back and win this primary, the White House and take our country back from the billionaire class? You can do that here:**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/we-must-keep-fighting**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-keep-fighting?refcode=em160418-s2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-keep-fighting?refcode=em160418-s2-full")
This is the most important week and a half of the campaign. How we respond in this moment could mean the difference between victory and defeat.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-keep-fighting?refcode=em160418-s2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-must-keep-fighting?refcode=em160418-s2-full")**

body:
One number on my mind | Friend --

There’s one day left until the New York primary, and I’ve got one number on my mind: 247. That’s the number of pledged delegates available in tomorrow’s primary -- more than in any state so far.

To put this in perspective, we are currently leading Bernie by just over 200 pledged delegates.

If we win tomorrow, we’ll be on track to win the nomination -- and the Sanders campaign’s hopes of a contested convention will seem even more far-fetched. But Bernie’s team knows they need a big win too, so they’re going for broke, outspending us on TV in New York by $2 million.

We can’t let them come close -- there’s too much at stake. If we're going up against Donald Trump or Ted Cruz in the general election, we need a Democratic nominee who knows what it takes not just to diagnose the problem, but to develop solutions and deliver results. We have to fight hard if we’re going to finish strong, get this nomination, and win the White House.

clean_body: One number on my mind | Friend -- There’s one day left until the New York primary, and I’ve got one number on my mind: 247. That’s the number of pledged delegates available in tomorrow’s primary -- more than in any state so far. To put this in perspective, we are currently leading Bernie by just over 200 pledged delegates. If we win tomorrow, we’ll be on track to win the nomination -- and the Sanders campaign’s hopes of a contested convention will seem even more far-fetched. But Bernie’s team knows they need a big win too, so they’re going for broke, outspending us on TV in New York by $2 million. We can’t let them come close -- there’s too much at stake. If we're going up against Donald Trump or Ted Cruz in the general election, we need a Democratic nominee who knows what it takes not just to diagnose the problem, but to develop solutions and deliver results. We have to fight hard if we’re going to finish strong, get this nomination, and win the White House. Chip in to show you’re not backing down (and when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker!): --- ]() Thanks, “Delegate Dave” David Huynh Director of Delegate Operations Hillary for America Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her: | --- ]() | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors. body:
| |

| Friend -- Planned Parenthood and women's reproductive health access are under attack by the GOP, and it couldn't be a more important issue this election. Here's the latest update from Florida:
---
|
### Joining the Team
## NARAL Pro-Choice America
One of the leading reproductive rights groups in the country endorsed Patrick for U.S. Senate! In the words of NARAL Senior Vice President Sasha Bruce:

| "Patrick has been fearless in going up against the anti-choice majority in Congress and pushing back against the Republican-led smear campaign targeting Planned Parenthood and other health care providers."
---
|
### THE LATEST
## Planned Parenthood Attacks
Just in the last year, the Republican-led Congress voted EIGHT times to defund Planned Parenthood. Patrick joined Democrats in opposing these efforts, but one defund bill reached the President's desk for the first time in 40 years. Unfortunately, in Florida, we don't have a Democrat in charge to veto these attacks on women's health. In fact, Rick Scott just authorized the DEFUNDING of Planned Parenthood at the state level, endangering health care access for over 67,000 Florida women. Plus, this move is likely _illegal!_
|
### Straight from Patrick
## Planned Parenthood in Florida
I am so disappointed to see these recent attacks on women's health in Florida. This is truly a move backwards -- we should be expanding access, not limiting it! Politicians have no business coming between a woman and her doctor. I will never stop fighting on this issue, and I hope you'll join me. [**Will you add your name to mine? Stand with Florida women and support access to reproductive care >>**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2323/738133e4/35f70c5b/7f8228e8/297147800/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160406/?subsource=ngpattre160418") | | [Add your name to support Planned Parenthood!](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2323/738133e4/35f70c5b/7f8228e8/297147800/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160406/?subsource=ngpattre160418")

\-- Patrick
